metadata.title: Call Kaids Roofing Website Refactor Plan
metadata.primary_goal: Increase qualified quote requests from SE Melbourne homeowners by improving proof, local SEO, and conversion UX.

seo_sources.name: Google Search Central SEO Starter Guide
Google Search Central JavaScript SEO Basics
Google Search Central Structured Data Gallery
Google Search Central LocalBusiness Structured Data

decisions.decision: Keep Vite, React, React Router, Supabase, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui for the first rebuild pass.
decisions.reason: The repo already has dynamic service and suburb routes, CMS tables, RAG knowledge infrastructure, SEO components, and lead forms.

decisions.decision: Make CMS-backed dynamic pages canonical before adding more hardcoded landing pages.
decisions.reason: Hardcoded and dynamic pages currently overlap and can create duplicate content or competing URLs.

decisions.decision: Use the owner-questionnaire-v2 domain notes as the highest-confidence source for public business facts.
decisions.reason: The vault questionnaire and generated domain files resolve most identity, legal, service-area, and warranty conflicts. Older hub notes and stale repo marketing copy should not override them.

verified_business_facts.service_area: 50 km radius from Clyde North, South-East Melbourne corridor

remaining_conflicts.issue: Website and repo marketing copy still contain conflicting warranty lengths, review counts, job counts, and location wording.
remaining_conflicts.required_resolution: Replace public claims with verified_business_facts and approved proof records.

remaining_conflicts.issue: Owner-verified warranty note says transferability is not confirmed.
remaining_conflicts.required_resolution: Do not claim transferability until confirmed.

remaining_conflicts.issue: PayID appears in quote terms but was not fully owner-confirmed for public display.
remaining_conflicts.required_resolution: Verify before advertising PayID on public pages.

required_proof: fully insured statement from questionnaire-verified domain notes
warranty wording from questionnaire-verified domain notes

phases.name: Business Invariants And Governance
phases.goal: Apply questionnaire-verified facts and prevent public-facing legal and trust inconsistencies.
tasks: Create a single public business invariant module.
Seed it from /root/AgentVault/05-Domain/CKR-Identity.md, CKR-Legal-Terms.md, CKR-Service-Area.md, and CKR-Warranties.md.
Replace hardcoded public claims with invariant references.
Document source-of-truth precedence: owner-questionnaire-v2 domain notes outrank older hub notes and stale repo marketing copy for business facts.
Add a website claims audit checklist.
Mark warranty transferability and PayID public display as unresolved.
acceptance_criteria: One source file controls public identity claims.
No page hardcodes conflicting ABN, email, warranty, or base suburb.
Schema uses the same values as visible content.
Unsupported claims are removed or marked as requiring proof.

phases.name: Public Route And CMS Unification
phases.goal: Make the CMS the public content engine.
tasks: Keep /services/:slug as canonical for service pages.
Keep /suburbs/:slug as canonical for suburb pages.
Redirect or CMS-back hardcoded duplicate service landing routes.
Add ServiceSuburbPage only for selected high-intent pages.
Add crawl-safe 404 behavior for missing service and suburb pages.
Check route order for static/dynamic shadowing.
acceptance_criteria: Each public service has one canonical URL.
Hardcoded and CMS pages do not compete.
Old URLs redirect to canonical equivalents.
Sitemap includes only canonical public URLs.

phases.name: SEO Foundation
phases.goal: Make Google and users understand each page.
tasks: Generate page titles from page intent.
Write unique meta descriptions for core pages.
Remove placeholder verification tags from SEOHead.
Remove low-value legacy meta tags and keyword stuffing.
Canonicalize URLs without tracking query params.
Generate sitemap from route and CMS data at build time.
Update robots.txt for admin/private and public assets.
Add breadcrumb UI and Breadcrumb JSON-LD.
Validate LocalBusiness, Service, FAQ, Article, and Breadcrumb schema.
acceptance_criteria: No repeated homepage snippet across core pages.
No placeholder GSC or Bing verification codes.
Sitemap lastmod reflects real content update dates.
Each indexable page has unique title, description, canonical, and visible H1.
Structured data matches visible content.

phases.name: Homepage Conversion Rebuild
phases.goal: Turn the homepage into a proof-led quote path.
acceptance_criteria: Above the fold answers what, where, why trust, and next step.
Mobile has call and quote affordances without layout shift.
No unsupported review, job, or warranty claims.
Real imagery is prioritized over decorative visuals.

phases.name: Service Hub And Service Pages
phases.goal: Make services useful for high-intent searchers and uncertain homeowners.
tasks: Rebuild services hub around problem-solution framing.
Use one CMS-backed service page template.
Add service-specific FAQs.
Pull related case studies from CMS.
Place lead form with photo upload on each service page.
acceptance_criteria: Service content comes from content_services.
Each service has unique metadata and FAQs.
Related case studies are pulled from CMS.
Each page has a clear quote path.

phases.name: Local SEO And Suburb Engine
phases.goal: Rank and convert for suburb-specific demand without thin pages.
tasks: Build CMS-backed suburb template.
Build service-suburb template for selected Tier 1 pages.
Write unique suburb intros and FAQs.
Link suburbs to services and nearby suburbs.
Launch only highest-value pages first.
acceptance_criteria: No copy-paste suburb pages.
Each local page has unique H1, title, description, intro, and FAQ set.
Pages link back to relevant service and service-area hub pages.
Initial launch focuses on highest-value pages.

phases.name: Trust And Proof System
phases.goal: Make proof visible and verifiable everywhere.
tasks: Connect before/after sections to content_case_studies.
Standardize proof card fields.
Add testimonial source model.
Add owner-led proof blocks.
Add service-specific warranty explainers.
acceptance_criteria: No fabricated review counts.
Proof blocks are backed by CMS records or approved knowledge.
Each high-value service page has at least one related proof element.

phases.name: Lead Capture And CRM Fit
phases.goal: Map every public conversion path into the CKR sales pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Every CTA records source context.
Photos are optional but encouraged.
Form copy is low-pressure and proof-led.
Quote submission lands in the correct lead pipeline stage.

phases.name: Performance Accessibility And UX Polish
phases.goal: Make the site fast, readable, and usable on phones.
tasks: Audit mobile layout at 360px, 390px, 768px, and desktop.
Use OptimizedImage and image variants for public hero/proof images.
Reduce nested card-heavy layouts.
Keep UI consistent with docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.
Ensure buttons do not overflow on mobile.
Add meaningful alt text for real job photos.
Use semantic headings and landmarks.
Minimize decorative animation on conversion pages.
acceptance_criteria: No mobile text or button overflow.
Hero LCP image is real and optimized.
Core Web Vitals are checked after implementation.
Public pages pass basic keyboard and screen-reader checks.

phases.name: Measurement And Release
tasks: Set up GA4 events for phone clicks, quote starts, quote submits, photo uploads, service CTAs, and suburb CTAs.
Connect Search Console verification with a real token.
Submit sitemap.
Validate top pages with URL Inspection.
Run Rich Results Test.
Run Lighthouse/PageSpeed checks.
Track first 30 days of clicks, impressions, CTR, calls, submissions, and indexed pages.
acceptance_criteria: Analytics events fire in preview and production.
Sitemap is accepted.
No critical structured data errors.
Lead source attribution works.

pre_implementation_checklist: Confirmed insurance wording: Bizcover public liability, $20M AUD, policy BZ21061CMB, certificate available on request.
Confirmed base suburb and service radius: Clyde North, 50 km radius, SE Melbourne corridor.
Confirmed warranty wording by service type: standard workmanship 10 years; minor repairs 5-7 years; temporary patch/make-safe none; product warranties 10/15/20 years by IRC product tier.
Confirm whether PayID should be advertised publicly.
Confirm approved claims for review count and jobs completed.
Confirm canonical URL pattern for service-suburb pages.
pre_release_checks: Playwright smoke for home, services, service detail, suburb detail, and quote form.
Run Rich Results Test for schema pages.
Run Search Console URL Inspection for representative SPA pages.
